profile.name: Harshraj Dabhi
profile.title: Senior Software Engineer | AI Systems & Forward-Deployed Engineering
profile.bio: Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years shipping production AI systems, LLM applications, and the backend platforms that run them. Work spans RAG pipelines, multi-agent orchestration, and high-throughput data infrastructure — deployed for enterprise teams at Blue Yonder, Dentsu, and Select Equity Group. Currently a Forward-Deployed AI Engineer embedded directly in customer teams, converting ambiguous requirements into deployed production systems using OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini, backed by scalable services in Python, FastAPI, and Django.

education.focus: Information Technology, Government Engineering College, Bhavnagar — CGPA: 7.97/10

experience.title: SDE-2 (Software Development Engineer II)
experience.description: Embedded within customer teams at Blue Yonder and Dentsu as a Forward-Deployed AI Engineer, shipping LLM-powered systems that automated incident response and campaign operations.
achievements: Embedded within customer teams at Blue Yonder and Dentsu as a Forward-Deployed AI Engineer, shipping LLM-powered systems that automated incident response and campaign operations, removing recurring manual work from live engineering and ops workflows.

Architected ozar.ai, an LLM-powered test-case generation SaaS on AWS (Lambda, RDS, API Gateway, Terraform), incorporating a RAG pipeline with RLHF scoring loop, a no-code automation engine, and multi-agent orchestration that turns a Jira ticket into ready-to-run test cases.

Built testautomationx.com end to end — an isolated test execution engine backed by AWS SQS and Celery that scales to 1000+ concurrent jobs executing in parallel, deployed on Kubernetes with Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Selenium, and PyTest.

Delivered two AI systems for client Data Processing Forms Pvt Ltd — a multi-LLM question generation framework (OpenAI GPT, Claude API, Gemini via LangChain) and a ResNet-based multilingual OCR classifier achieving ~80% accuracy across handwriting scripts.

Led prompt engineering and RAG pipeline design across client and internal projects, grounding OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini outputs in retrieved source data with output validation keeping responses traceable to evidence.

Migrated the internal product stack from AWS to a self-managed Hostinger Kubernetes cluster built from scratch, reducing deployment costs by 60–70% while adding centralised logging and Grafana monitoring.
Designed and shipped production marketing sites for testautomationx.com, ozar.ai, and calidadinfotech.com using AI coding assistants, delivering all three sites without a dedicated frontend engineer.
Recognised with the Code Innovator Award in both 2024 and 2025 for technical work within Calidad Infotech.

experience.title: Python Developer → Software Engineer
experience.description: Built a real-time financial data ETL platform for Select Equity Group and developed ML anomaly detection models deployed behind REST APIs.
achievements: Built a real-time financial data ETL platform for Select Equity Group, ingesting 10,000+ tickers per second via WebSockets into Snowflake and BigQuery, normalising data across 50 tables from 4–5 source pipelines with cross-source data quality checks.

Developed ML anomaly detection and predictive analytics models with scikit-learn, deployed behind REST APIs on Docker with Azure DevOps CI/CD, flagging outliers in incoming financial data before they reached downstream reports.

Designed complex SQL reconciliation queries across financial datasets and containerised all services on GCP with Docker, backed by comprehensive PyTest suites that caught data integrity issues before production.
Ran delivery of multiple concurrent data engineering projects in Agile sprints, coordinating across cross-functional teams to ship each on its committed timeline.
Received the Rising Star Award (2022), given in first year for delivery of the Select Equity Group ETL platform and onboarding of new pipeline technologies.

experience.title: Junior Software Engineer
experience.description: Built business data automation and reporting solutions replacing recurring manual report-building with scheduled jobs.
achievements: Built business data automation and reporting solutions with .NET, Python, SQL Server, and VBA that replaced recurring manual report-building, converting multi-hour weekly analyst tasks into scheduled jobs that ran without intervention.

Designed data visualisation dashboards and ETL scripts that consolidated feeds from multiple disconnected business systems into a single reporting view, replacing manual cross-system collation for senior management reviews.
Translated business requirements from cross-functional stakeholders into production-ready software solutions, delivering full design, development, and testing documentation for each engagement.

certifications.title: Machine Learning from Basic to Advanced

achievements.title: Code Innovator Award — Calidad Infotech
achievements.description: Awarded for building the company's LLM and RAG product capability and deploying it into client engagements at Blue Yonder and Dentsu.

achievements.title: Innovator Award — Calidad Infotech
achievements.description: Awarded for architecting the ozar.ai and testautomationx.com internal products from the ground up.

achievements.title: Rising Star Award — XDuce Corporation
achievements.description: Awarded in first year for delivering the Select Equity Group real-time financial ETL platform across cross-functional teams.

projects.title: AI-Powered SRE & Root Cause Analysis Platform
projects.description: AI-driven RCA system for Blue Yonder that reduced incident resolution time from several hours to under 20 minutes (80%+ improvement), ingesting observability data from Zabbix and AppDynamics into a RAG pipeline with LangGraph multi-agent orchestration on Azure OpenAI.

projects.title: AI Workflow Automation — Forward-Deployed Engineering
projects.description: Embedded within Dentsu's teams to ship LLM-powered workflow automation pipelines spanning content generation, data enrichment, and approval routing — collapsing multi-step manual processes into single triggered runs connected to CRM, ad, and analytics APIs.

projects.title: ozar.ai — AI Test Case Generation SaaS
projects.description: LLM-powered SaaS that generates context-aware test cases directly from Jira tickets using a RAG pipeline with RLHF scoring loop and no-code automation engine. Deployed serverless on AWS with Celery for async LLM processing.
highlights: Jira → test cases, zero manual effort

projects.title: testautomationx.com — Test Management Platform
projects.description: Full test-case management platform with an isolated execution engine on AWS SQS and Celery scaling to 1000+ concurrent parallel jobs. Deployed on Kubernetes with Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Selenium, and Allure Reports.

projects.title: GenAI Multi-LLM Question Generation Framework
projects.description: Multi-LLM routing framework dispatching prompts across OpenAI GPT, Claude API, and Gemini using a custom model-ranking algorithm. Built modular prompt templates for MCQ, descriptive, and scenario-based formats with Hugging Face semantic similarity scoring.
highlights: Automatic answer grading via Hugging Face

projects.title: ResNet-Based Multilingual OCR Classifier
projects.description: ResNet deep learning model for multilingual handwriting classification achieving ~80% accuracy across multiple scripts. Built a full preprocessing pipeline with Tesseract OCR as baseline, evaluated with F1 score, confusion matrix, and per-class accuracy.
highlights: F1 score in line with industry benchmarks

projects.title: Intelligent Eye-Motion Anti-Cheating System
projects.description: Real-time gaze and motion detection pipeline with OpenCV and TensorFlow monitoring live online assessments and flagging suspicious behaviour. Low-latency live video streaming via Flask and WebRTC enabling real-time inference without buffering.
highlights: ML anomaly detection for live proctoring

projects.title: Real-Time Financial ETL & Analytics Platform
projects.description: Scalable ETL pipelines ingesting 10,000+ financial tickers per second via WebSockets for Select Equity Group, normalising data across 50 tables from 4–5 source systems into Snowflake and BigQuery. Automated with Jenkins/JAMS and containerised on GCP.
